content.title: OKTAFORCE ecosystem: security, efficiency and intelligence for condominiums
content.subtitle: A single operational flow brings together remote concierge, proprietary AI, predictive maintenance and facilities management.
content.description: OKTAFORCE Brazil is a technological force in condominium security. We combine remote concierge, analytical monitoring, intelligent maintenance and human excellence to turn your property's routine into efficiency, protection and peace of mind.
content.caption: OKTAFORCE Identity, Guidelines and Strategy

highlight.label: Hybrid monitoring with AI and dedicated teams

pains.title: Where traditional concierge fails, OKTAFORCE delivers results
pains.subtitle: Outdated models add costs, bureaucracy and blind spots. Our ecosystem is designed to anticipate risks and simplify life for property managers and residents.

costs.title: Unpredictable costs and inflated fees
costs.description: We cut operating expenses by integrating remote concierge, maintenance and facilities into scalable modules with financial predictability.

humanRisk.title: Constant exposure to human error
humanRisk.description: Artificial intelligence, automated playbooks and a 24/7 command center eliminate vulnerabilities caused by on-site shifts and unstructured procedures.

lackControl.title: Fragmented data and low visibility
lackControl.description: The OKTAFORCE Super App records every access, alert and delivery in real time, ensuring a full audit trail for governance.

inefficiency.title: A stalled experience for managers and residents
inefficiency.description: We digitize approvals, bookings, communications and parcel logistics to free up time and raise resident satisfaction.

benefits.subtitle: Immediate outcomes for professional property managers, administrators and residents.

savings.title: Proven financial efficiency
savings.description: Modular plans lower operating costs without giving up security, delivering sustained savings month after month.

zeroSurrender.title: Security without surrender
zeroSurrender.description: A redundant remote command center, automated playbooks and on-site contingency ensure immediate response in any scenario.

autonomy.title: Digital autonomy for residents
autonomy.description: The Super App centralizes access control, bookings, panic button and communication between residents, managers and administrators.

transparency.title: Transparency and governance
transparency.description: Real-time dashboards, auditable reports and complete event history enable assertive decisions by the condo board.

reliability.title: 24/7 ultra-fast support
reliability.description: SLA of up to 1h30 for critical risks and 80% of calls answered within 7 seconds by certified specialists.

locker.title: Intelligent parcel logistics
locker.description: Smart Locker and Smart Drop integrated with the Super App for secure, trackable deliveries without manual intervention.

intelligence.title: Everything connected. Everything under control.
intelligence.subtitle: Remote concierge, proprietary AI, communications and intelligent maintenance work together to protect and streamline condominium life.

highlights.text: Access control via biometrics, QR code and facial recognition inside the Super App.
Analytical intelligence that monitors, predicts and triggers automatic alerts.
Complete history of interactions, deliveries and incidents available in real time.

faq.title: Understand how we evolve condominium security

items.question: Who is OKTAFORCE Brazil?
items.answer: We are a technology-driven force dedicated to condominium security. We integrate remote concierge, artificial intelligence, intelligent maintenance and human excellence to deliver efficiency, protection and peace of mind every day.

items.question: How does the digital ecosystem work in practice?
items.answer: The Super App connects residents, property managers and administrators to a 24/7 command center with proprietary AI. Access control, deliveries, bookings and communication happen in a single flow with full redundancy and automated playbooks.

items.question: What ensures continuous security?
items.answer: Ultra-fast service, SLA of up to 1h30 for critical risks, no-cost parts replacement and hybrid operation with on-site contingency keep the system running even in extreme scenarios.

items.question: Does the operation include maintenance and facilities?
items.answer: Yes. With OKTAPREV we monitor gates, CCTV, alarms and access control 24/7. OKTAFORCE Facilities integrates cleaning, janitorial services, reception and operational support to keep the property running with excellence.

items.question: How do we start a project with OKTAFORCE?
items.answer: We conduct a consultative assessment, design a tailored plan and manage the rollout with close support for the property manager and the administrator.

content.line1: Ready to experience the new standard in condominium security?
content.line2: Integrate remote concierge, AI, intelligent maintenance and human service in a single ecosystem.
content.line3: Talk to OKTAFORCE and receive a plan aligned with your property's guidelines.
